examples: Shoppers wrestled the raider to the ground.
Angelina adopted Maddox when he was just seven months old after she visited a Cambodian orphanage while shooting her film Lara Croft: Tomb Raider in 2002.
S Lara Croft: Tomb Raider made Jolie an international superstar.
Life plays funny tricks: Icahn, the well-known corporate raider, is now in the medicine business.
It also explains all the ludonarritive dissonance (another pet peeve of mine) in Tomb Raider.
